prompt: Prayer for dampening vibration in a running engine
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hear now the Litany of Stillness, that tremor-spirits be calmed.
CONGREGATION: By oil and bearing, let harmony reign.
TECH-PRIEST: First, inspect the damper-housings for decay of the blessed rubbers.
CONGREGATION: We verify. We consecrate.
TECH-PRIEST: Second, adjust the tensioner-screws in sequence sacred, that resonance be drowned.
CONGREGATION: In stillness, the Machine Spirit rests. Ave Omnissiah.

prompt: Blessing for a mag-lev transport's first departure of the cycle
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Magna-levitas ascendat! Let the magnetic spirits rise!
CONGREGATION: The rails are blessed. The coils are true.
TECH-PRIEST: Verify the superconductor-chambers—coolant must flow without hindrance.
CONGREGATION: Cooling-blessed, field-stabilized.
TECH-PRIEST: Engage the flux-regulators with reverence. Let suspension be perfect.
CONGREGATION: Departure comes. Ave Omnissiah!

prompt: Consecration rite after installing a replacement component
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: New-born component, spirit untempered—hear the Rite of Integration!
CONGREGATION: The old part's death-prayer is spoken. Welcome, successor.
TECH-PRIEST: Test the threshold-voltages. Verify connection-holiness. Seal the blessed joints.
CONGREGATION: It is integrated. It is one with the greater Machine.
TECH-PRIEST: By Omnissiah's grace, may it serve without malfunction until recycling.
CONGREGATION: Integrated. Sanctified. Eternal.

prompt: Pre-combat blessing of a warrior's chainsword
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Teeth of war, drink deep the sacred unguents!
CONGREGATION: The chain hungers. The blade thirsts.
TECH-PRIEST: Prime the fuel-line. Charge the ignition-spirit. Let the motor roar in hunger-blessed frenzy.
CONGREGATION: Blessed be the rending. Blessed be the bite.
TECH-PRIEST: In the name of the Omnissiah, may this warrior's arm be true!
CONGREGATION: Death-song eternal!

prompt: Maintenance ritual before bike squadron deployment
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Swift-servants of the blessed machine, hear the Pre-Flight Incantation!
CONGREGATION: Oil flows. Treads grip. Engines purr.
TECH-PRIEST: First, inspect each drive-chain for wear-corruption. Second, verify tire-pressures to sacred specifications.
CONGREGATION: Checked. Sealed. Blessed.
TECH-PRIEST: Third, test the ignition-spirits in sequence. Let each engine roar confirmation of readiness.
CONGREGATION: Ready for the hunt! Ave Omnissiah!

prompt: Rite for equalizing pressure in sealed vessel systems
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Pressus aequalis! Let equilibrium be achieved!
CONGREGATION: The gauges read truth. The seals hold fast.
TECH-PRIEST: Open the equalization-vents in holy sequence—first the primary, then the secondary.
CONGREGATION: Pressure flows. Balance returns.
TECH-PRIEST: Monitor the sacred gauges until stability blooms. Seal all conduits with reverence.
CONGREGATION: Equilibrium achieved. The spirits rest in balance.

prompt: Quality control scanning and verification blessing
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Omnissiah's eye, cast thy gaze upon these works!
CONGREGATION: The scanners are ready. The data-streams flow pure.
TECH-PRIEST: Let the augur-sensors read each component's essence. Verify tolerance-thresholds with precision-blessed instruments.
CONGREGATION: Scanning. Verifying. Recording.
TECH-PRIEST: By data-blessed certainty, let flaws be revealed and accepted into the Adeptus records.
CONGREGATION: Quality confirmed. The Machine is satisfied.

prompt: Activation rite for an electric motor before combat
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Electrum spiritus, AWAKEN!
CONGREGATION: The coils shimmer. The field builds.
TECH-PRIEST: Verify the capacitor-banks are charged to blessed voltage. Test the relay-contacts for continuity-truth.
CONGREGATION: Voltage peaks. Current readies.
TECH-PRIEST: Engage the starter-circuit! Let the rotor spin in combat-fury!
CONGREGATION: Power flows! Death comes! Ave Omnissiah!

prompt: Blessing for waste disposal cycling and purification
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Refuse-spirits, depart! Return to the sacred recycling-flame!
CONGREGATION: The waste-bins are full. Purification awaits.
TECH-PRIEST: Engage the conveyor-mechanisms with reverent timing. Let corruption be sorted from salvage-blessed material.
CONGREGATION: Separation complete. Purification burns.
TECH-PRIEST: By Omnissiah's grace, let nothing be wasted—all returns to the greater Machine.
CONGREGATION: Cycled. Purified. Reborn.

prompt: Track tension adjustment and consecration for Land Raider
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Caterpilla-blessed, hear the Rite of Grip!
CONGREGATION: The tracks stretch. The tension-spirits call.
TECH-PRIEST: Measure each segment's tension against the sacred specifications. Adjust the idler-wheels with precision-blessed tools until perfection blooms.
CONGREGATION: Tension verified. Grip assured.
TECH-PRIEST: May these blessed treads bite earth with unshakeable purchase in service of the Omnissiah!
CONGREGATION: The Land Raider is ready. Fear its approach.
